PREFIX pq: <http://www.wikidata.org/prop/qualifier/>
PREFIX ps: <http://www.wikidata.org/prop/statement/>
PREFIX wd: <http://www.wikidata.org/entity/>
PREFIX rdfs: <http://www.w3.org/2000/01/rdf-schema#>
PREFIX p: <http://www.wikidata.org/prop/>
SELECT ?narratorLabel WHERE {
  wd:Q199853 p:P161 ?statement .
  ?statement ps:P161 ?narrator .
  ?narrator rdfs:label ?narratorLabel .
  FILTER(LANG(?narratorLabel) = "en")
  .
  ?statement pq:P453 ?role .
  ?role rdfs:label ?roleLabel .
  FILTER(LANG(?roleLabel) = "en")
  .
  FILTER(CONTAINS(LCASE(?roleLabel) , "gossip girl") || CONTAINS(LCASE(?roleLabel) , "narrator"))
  .
}
